positive: A minimalist, geometric pattern illustration featuring a cluster of diverse, stylized cosmic elements: nebulae rendered as soft, flowing washes of deep indigo, violet, and teal; orbiting crescent moons depicted as elegant, polished silver silhouettes; and constellations formed by interconnected, sharp white line art. The composition is centralized, balanced, and suitable for repeat tiling. Use strong negative space and high contrast against a neutral midnight blue background. Style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern scientific diagram aesthetic. High detail, clean vector lines, isolated objects, print-ready, symmetrical arrangement.
